chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI C. P. No. D- 1224 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ Date Order with signature of Judge ___________________________________________________________ 1) For orders on CMA No.17616/2025. 2) For orders on office objections No.1 to 4. 3) For hearing of Main Case. 29.08.2025. Mr. Usman Farooq, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr. Muhammad Hisham Mahar, A.A.G., Sindh. Mr. Khalid Javed, Advocate for the Respondents No.2, 3 & 4. ________________ MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J.- Petitioner is a student of Karachi University studying in BS Visual Studies Department. He appeared in first year exam but could not qualify six papers out of 17, hence his ratio of success is less than 80%, a benchmark for promotion in the second year. Learned counsel for Karachi University submits that if the petitioner appears in the supplementary exams of the said course and attains 80% success rate he would be promoted to second year. He further submits that the petitioner should maintain discipline and stop sending false and fabricated complaints of his teachers. Learned counsel for the petitioner submits that petitioner would appear in the supplementary exams in the remaining six papers and will withdraw the complaints. Therefore, this petition is disposed of in the terms that the Karachi University shall allow the petitioner to appear in the supplementary exams and on attaining 80% success rate, promote him to second year, according to law. J U D G E J U D G E Nasir/
